case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. VICKIE GUREEA

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, VICKIE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-09-2009

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $375.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, VICKIE
